item.title: British police arrest Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor on suspicion of misconduct

item.title: Parents of students at ski academy among California avalanche victims
item.description: The group of skiers involved in the deadly avalanche in California's Sierra Nevada Mountains on Tuesday includes parents of students at a local school...

item.title: Early prenatal care, considered best for moms and babies, is on the decline in the US
item.description: Early prenatal care improves the chances of having a healthy pregnancy and baby

item.title: WATCH: Lavender marriages appeal to new generation
item.description: While lavender marriages were often a necessity for the LGBTQ community in the 1950s, some younger generations are curious about them and other modern...

item.title: WATCH: Eight skiers killed in deadliest ski-related avalanche in modern U.S. history
item.description: Nevada County Sheriff Shannan Moon said there were "whiteout conditions" during the rescue mission that saved six survivors.
